name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: What They're Saying: Gov. Holcomb's 2020 State of the State Address
body:
People are talking about Governor Eric Holcomb’s 2020 State of the State address – a report on Indiana’s progress and a bold vision for our future... |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e4cd33512b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **The State of our State has Never Been Stronger!**
**People are talking about Governor Eric Holcomb’s 2020 State of the State address – a report on Indiana’s progress and a bold vision for our future.

[Read the full speech](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=75cc06051c&e=1acd9bb3d6), **[watch it](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0f78747c89&e=1acd9bb3d6)**, and then see what people are saying:**
---
|
---
| **_U.S. Senator Todd Young _**
"Last night Governor Holcomb laid out a great vision for Indiana. Our economy is indeed strong and there is more encouraging news on the horizon. Issues he raised like T21, health price transparency, infant mortality, veteran services, and facilitating more adoptions are the same issues we are seeking to address on the federal level, and I appreciate the Governor’s leadership back home."

**_Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch:_**
"Privileged to be with Governor Holcomb for his fourth State of the State. Because of his leadership, alongside all our incredible agency heads, the State of our State is strong!"

**_Indiana House Speaker Brian Bosma_**
“Governor Holcomb continues to provide strong leadership and vision for our state, and we look forward to working closely with him this session as we complete the people’s work on time and under budget. He is a tremendous ambassador of Indiana’s success story, and finds ways to get big wins for Hoosiers. We are excited about the record-setting pace of our economic development efforts, and we look forward to seeing the results play out in communities across our state.”

**_Indiana House Speaker-Elect Todd Huston:_**
“Our state continues to earn the spotlight with our fiscal stability and top-ranked economic environment, which attracts businesses large and small that support families across our state. With a structurally balanced budget and healthy reserves, we are on the right track to continue funding our state’s priorities and building on our momentum. Governor Holcomb has shown great leadership, and we will continue working together to support all Hoosiers.”

**_Senate President Pro Tem Rod Bray:_**
“In tonight’s address, Governor Holcomb laid out a compelling vision for improving the lives of Hoosiers all across our state both now and in the future. My caucus members and I are ready to continue working with the governor and our colleagues in the House of Representatives to improve workforce development and education, eliminate government debt, and improve health care cost transparency for Hoosiers. Together I believe we are making great strides that will continue to move our state forward.”

**_Noblesville Mayor Chris Jensen:_**
“Governor Eric Holcomb is as genuine as they come. [The closing] of his speech drives that message home. Proud to call him governor and even prouder to call him a friend.”

**_Kokomo Mayor Tyler Moore:_**
“Governor Holcomb featured Fiat-Chrysler‘s planned investment in Kokomo during his State of the State address. A $400 million investment means big things for our workers and our community.”

**_Indianapolis City-County Councilor Paul M. Annee_**
“Governor Holcomb and his team are truly taking our state to the next level and putting people FIRST!”

**_Tony Katz, WIBC Radio Host:_**
“There is not a Democrat in Indiana that can beat Governor Holcomb in November.”

**_Rick Ward, President, UAW Local 685:_**
“We’ve got a lot of new product that looks like it is coming to us, and it looks like it’s going to be a bright future... It’s kind of like Christmas...the workforce is excited about this and anxious to get the engine plant up and running.”

**_Randy Kron, President, Indiana Farm Bureau:_**
“Big successes, big investments, big goals. Congratulations Governor Holcomb on a great State of the State and leading Indiana to the Next Level!”

**_Brian Tabor, President, Indiana Hospital Association:_**
“Governor Eric Holcomb set forth a strong vision tonight for a healthier Indiana, better transparency for healthcare consumers, and establishing key measures like protecting patients from surprise medical bills. His proposals will put Indiana on a path to lower costs for Hoosiers and better physical and mental health outcomes.”

**_Ambre Marr Indiana AARP, State Legislative Director:_**
“Broadband is an issue that needs to be front and center, and we commend Governor Holcomb for continually working to connect communities to resources that are unattainable without access. Also, we appreciate that rising healthcare costs were addressed by Governor Holcomb.”

**_Brian Gould, Director of Member Engagement. Accelerate Indiana Municipalities (AIM):_**
“Governor Holcomb is diving right in to the economy. Indiana’s unemployment rate is at a 19 year low. The Hoosier state set all time records on job creation and capital investment in Indiana for 2019.”

**_Jean Renk,_** **_Government & Community Relations Manager, Duke Energy:_**
"Thanks to Lt Governor Suzanne Crouch, a champion for Hoosiers with I/DD. As Governor Holcomb delivered his annual State of the State address tonight a special mention was included for Hoosiers with I/DD who aspire to have jobs leading to greater independence."

**_State Senator Michael Young:_**
“In tonight’s State of the State address, Gov. Holcomb announced a veterans’ facility – the first of its kind in the country – will open this spring, bringing together multiple resources for veterans under one roof. As a lawmaker, advocating for and supporting Hoosier veterans is extremely important to me, and I look forward to the completion of this facility so veterans can access these organizations and departments with ease. Along with the benefits Indiana already offers, such as in-state tuition for veterans and income tax exemptions for military pensions, this new resource will help our state become even more welcoming to veterans and their families.”

**_State Senator Erin Houchin:_**
"Foster children are among the most vulnerable populations in our state, and it’s important we support them. I am thrilled to see Gov. Holcomb is creating the first adoption unit within the DCS – dedicating staff members for the specific purpose of helping find permanent homes for foster children will allow caseworkers to focus on protecting children and, at the same time, help make the adoption process more efficient so children can be united with their forever families.

**_State Representative Tony Cook:_**
"Fiat-Chrysler is building its first engine in Indiana, as part of a $400M investment, announced during Gov. Holcomb's State of the State address inside the Indiana House. Awesome for Tipton and Howard Counties!"
---
|
---
| **What did you think about Governor Holcomb's 2020 State of the State address?

Share your thoughts on social media with the hashtags #INSOTS and #NextLevel!**

name: Cory Booker
subject: hey, will you be a founding donor of our campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Team, A few days ago, I announced that I'm running for re-election to the Senate. Since then, I've been humbled by the outpouring of support for our campaign. It is an incredible honor every single day to represent the great state of New Jersey in the halls of the United States Senate. Now, I'm asking you to help me return to the Senate for another term. Here's the reality: We need the resources to build a strong re-election campaign that can ensure a victory come November. That's why we're setting a big $250,000 goal to get us started. **Can you chip in right now to become one of our founding donors? This is our first big fundraising goal of this campaign -- and we won 't be able to reach it without your help.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200116_CB_20200116-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

The truth is that we have to scale up our campaign very quickly. It's imperative that we start hiring more staff, opening campaign offices, and placing ads to spread our message.
I have every intention of starting another term in the Senate next year -- but I mean it when I say that we can't make it happen without the support of this grassroots team.
**[I'm asking right now if you can become a founding donor of this campaign, team. Please chip in to help us get this re-election effort off the ground and on the pathway to victory in November.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200116_CB_20200116-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Thanks for standing with me.
Cory

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This is about rebuilding our middle class
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our families deserve this.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/overtime?utm_source=ema_2020-01-16_overtime&source=ema_2020-01-16_overtime&utm_campaign=overtime&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=8022%2E868730%2Ez2csQC) Friend, Let's be honest about what 9-5 really means: "9-5 job" no longer really means 9-5 -- it can be 7-7, or 8-6, or even longer. Most salaried employees are working well over a traditional 40-hour week, and between childcare and bills piling up at home, it can be impossible to keep up. It's yet another way big companies are squeezing the middle class. And it's wrong. So here in Washington state, we're doing something about it. **It's hard to overstate how important this new policy is -- not just for Washington families but as a progressive model for the entire country.** It's time we put middle-class families before giant corporations. So I directed the Department of Labor & Industries to update Washington's overtime rules. Hourly employees have long been entitled to overtime -- but salaried workers have generally been entitled to it only if they make less than a certain amount: about $23,660 under federal law, or more where state laws are more generous. At my direction, Washington state now has the country's strongest overtime rules. By 2028, salaried workers earning up to $83,356 will be entitled to time-and-a-half overtime pay. This is an incredible step to support hundreds of thousands of salaried workers and a crucial step toward rebuilding the middle class. But that's just here in Washington state -- I firmly believe the rest of the country's salaried employees deserve these same protections. [**I'm calling on all 2020 candidates to take a stand to protect workers' rights by embracing these same overtime rules in their campaigns: Add your name to join me.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/overtime?utm_source=ema_2020-01-16_overtime&source=ema_2020-01-16_overtime&utm_campaign=overtime&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8022%2E868730%2Ez2csQC) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/overtime?utm_source=ema_2020-01-16_overtime&source=ema_2020-01-16_overtime&utm_campaign=overtime&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8022%2E868730%2Ez2csQC)
---
Salaried Americans work an average of 49 hours per week -- that adds up to about one extra day every week, and 11.7 additional weeks per year. Increasing overtime rules assures that workers are getting compensated for that time -- and that helps us rebuild the middle class.
Lawmakers have been hesitant to update overtime rules to match with current working conditions and office culture, which for so many Americans is early mornings and late nights -- with no additional pay. By some estimates, as few as 7% of salaried workers are entitled to overtime. We have changed that in Washington state, and presidential candidates should commit to do the same nationally.
This is about rebuilding our middle class, and if we don't start now, we'll keep falling behind. Americans deserve the same protections we have here in Washington, wherever they live -- I hope all the 2020 presidential candidates agree.
[**I'm calling on all the 2020 Democratic presidential candidates to take up Washington's overtime rules in their campaigns to rebuild our middle class -- if you want to see them make a commitment to salaried employees in every state, add your name right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/overtime?utm_source=ema_2020-01-16_overtime&source=ema_2020-01-16_overtime&utm_campaign=overtime&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=8022%2E868730%2Ez2csQC)
Very truly yours,
Jay

And that means tomorrow will mark the next phase of this Democratic primary: the first opportunity for... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a47a/45c30650/1ed3c1a2c/66fe52c0/230745605/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Tomorrow, early voting begins in Minnesota.

And that means **tomorrow** will mark the next phase of this Democratic primary: the first opportunity for voters across America to cast a ballot for Elizabeth Warren.

This is a big deal. Over the past year, we've been holding town halls, having important conversations with voters, knocking doors, and making phone calls for Elizabeth in all 50 states, D.C., and Puerto Rico.

It's how we're going to win -- by leaving no one behind, and making sure that every voice matters.

**But to see the results of our hard work pay off, it's a team effort, and we need your help.** We need every supporter from every state who's invested in this movement to chip in what they can in these final days before primary season so we can run the strongest campaign possible on the ground, on the airwaves, and online. **Every contribution right now -- $2, $10, or $23 (our average) -- makes a meaningful difference for our budget.**

| | | Yesterday, we launched something big: More than 1,000 supporters gathered in New York City last night to celebrate the launch of "Women for Mike" -- a movement that will organize in communities across the country to amplify women's voices on the issues that matter most. Before Super Tuesday, supporters will host **100** locally-organized Women for Mike events nationwide. [**Be part of this exciting movement, too: Add your name now to join Women for Mike in your community!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=ac23ec6ffc&e=f54746ec54)

| As Mayor and as an entrepreneur and philanthropist, Mike has long supported advancing gender equality, maternal and reproductive health, and women's economic development both in the U.S. and around the world. And this is a critical moment for women: In 2016, 58% of Democratic primary voters were women, and many of those women view Donald Trump as an existential threat to the decency, safety, and security of our nation. Women for Mike will organize to help elect Mike our next president, to beat Donald Trump and bring real progress to this country -- for women and all Americans. [**Everyone can join the fight: Add your name now to join Women for Mike, and help elect Mike as our next president.**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=50f46fa9cd&e=f54746ec54) Thanks, Team Bloomberg 2020

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Join me in Katy, Texas this Saturday to support Dr. Eliz Markowitz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | Friend, When I ended my campaign for president, I told you that I wasn't done fighting. To build a nation where everyone can reach their dreams, we can't afford to leave a single person on the sidelines--and that includes in my home state of Texas. This year we have the chance to turn Texas blue, flip key districts across the state, and ensure more people in our state have the opportunities they need to live a prosperous life. That's why I couldn't be more proud to support Dr. Eliz Markowitz in her special election for House District 28--and to join her [THIS Saturday at a canvass in Katy, Texas](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc908/3eb3e2fc/6a168561/744ea342/2532736238/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/eliz4tx/event/201949/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+THIS+Saturday+at+a+canvass+in+Katy+Texas&utm_campaign=20200116_em_castro_markowitz&source=20200116_em_castro_markowitz") to help get out the vote ahead of the January 28th special election. | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc908/3eb3e2fc/6a168561/744ea341/2532736238/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/eliz4tx/event/201949/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20200116_em_castro_markowitz&source=20200116_em_castro_markowitz")
---

**Canvass Kickoff with Sec. Juli an Castro and Dr. Eliz Markowitz **
Saturday, January 18th at 1:30PM
[RSVP Here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc908/3eb3e2fc/6a168561/744ea340/2532736238/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://www.mobilize.us/eliz4tx/event/201949/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+RSVP+Here&utm_campaign=20200116_em_castro_markowitz&source=20200116_em_castro_markowitz")

Dr. Markowitz has spent her career fighting for a more efficient health care system and and a more fair school system. She's running to ensure that all Texans, no matter their income or background, can get a good education, quality health care, and can live safely in their communities.

This special election is our first chance to flip a Texas House seat ahead of the November elections. We can send a message that our state has had enough of Republican attempts to strip health care from our residents or undermine our children's schools.

It's time to say once and for all that Texas can be a blue state, starting with our state house--but we need your help.

Join us at our get out the vote canvass this Saturday. I hope to see you there!

With gratitude,
Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc908/3eb3e2fc/6a168561/744ea34f/2532736238/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20200116_em_castro_markowitz&source=20200116_em_castro_markowitz")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc908/3eb3e2fc/6a168561/744ea34e/2532736238/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20200116_em_castro_markowitz&source=20200116_em_castro_markowitz")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc908/3eb3e2fc/6a168561/744ea34d/2532736238/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20200116_em_castro_markowitz&source=20200116_em_castro_markowitz")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: SHOCKING new details from Rachel Maddow's interview with Lev Parnas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | In an exclusive interview with Rachel Maddow, Lev Parnas broke his silence for the first time in the impeachment proceedings, saying, "President Trump knew exactly what was going on" in Ukraine. "He was aware of all my movements. I wouldn't do anything without the consent of Rudy Giuliani, or the president. I have no intent, I have no reason to speak to any of these officials," Parnas told Maddow. And John Bolton says he'll testify in the Senate trial if subpoenaed. But Mitch McConnell has repeatedly said he's coordinating with the White House, that the impeachment is a sham, and Democrats should have NO SAY in a fair trial, and McConnell is STILL REFUSING to call ANY witnesses in the Senate impeachment trial. And as Slate reports, "As more evidence pours out, Mitch McConnell's position becomes increasingly untenable." **[That 's why we need 10,000 signatures TODAY to demand Mitch McConnell hold a fair trial and call witnesses so we, the American people, can understand the truth about Trump's quid pro quo scandal with Ukraine. name: Steve Chabot
subject: IMPEACHMENT = YOUR TAX $ WASTED
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhckrhd-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

I am fighting hard every day to defend our president and Constitution — and to hold out-of-control Democrats in Washington accountable for their impeachment sideshow.

Yesterday, I was proud to appear on “The Sean Hannity Show” and “The Rush Limbaugh Show” to discuss the Nancy Pelosi-produced circus happening in Washington, its mockery of due process -- and the priorities Washington should be focused on addressing for the American people.

Here’s some of what I had to say:

“There’s no reason our duly-elected president ought to have to go through this impeachment.”

“This whole process has been a sham from the very beginning, and it’s too bad that Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have put our country through this.”

Friend, are you with me? Do you believe this process has also been a sham? Will you chip in $20 now to show me that you still stand with our president? https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20200116_quotes_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2]

CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20200116_quotes_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2]

“Rather than work on things that actually matter to our country, we are wasting the American people’s time AND tax dollars on impeaching the American President.”

Friend, you deserve so much better than the Democrats’ charade. The American people deserve so much better than this.

I hope you still stand with me and our president as we fight for the Constitution and for you.

Steve Chabot

6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. Like https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jhckrhd-kujkulhluu-f/ Tweet https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jhckrhd-kujkulhluu-z/ Forward https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jhckrhd-l-v Preferences https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jhckrhd-961825B2-kujkulhluu-e | Unsubscribe https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jhckrhd-kujkulhluu-s/

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: A huge win for President Trump
body:
Despite constant criticism from the liberal media, President Trump's strategy on China worked. Peter,I co-authored an op-ed yesterday in the Wall Street Journal thanking President Trump for getting tough on China. Despite constant criticism from the liberal media, President Trump's strategy on China worked.I hope you'll take a minute to read it below.Thank you. Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN)China Surrenders to Reality in the Trade Dispute
Trump's tariffs were an effective weapon, and Beijing had to bend as its economic growth slowed.
By Andy Puzder and Bill Hagerty
Jan. 15, 2020 7:10 pm ETThe U.S. and China signed a "phase one" trade deal Wednesday--a meaningful victory in an economic conflict that's been building for decades. The agreement is a credit to President Trump's China strategy and a mark against his detractors.

When Mr. Trump took office, he quickly implemented targeted tariffs to pressure China into ending its abusive trade practices. Critics relentlessly assailed that decision. They contended that his "trade war" would crash the U.S. economy.

It turns out China depends more on exports to the U.S. than America does on Chinese imports. Where U.S. companies rerouted supply lines with the speed only free enterprise can attain, the tariffs wrecked the delicate balance of China's state-managed markets. Last year China posted three straight quarters of around 6% annualized growth in gross domestic product. In the third quarter, it hit 6% flat, its weakest result in nearly three decades. The reality is likely worse than the official numbers. Economists have questioned the accuracy of China's official economic data for years. Based on discussion with Asian business leaders and our personal experience, neither of us would be surprised if China's real growth is in the 0% to minus-2% range.

The fight with China had to come eventually and Mr. Trump's deregulation and tax reform helped position the U.S. economy to endure it. For years, Chinese corporations have brazenly stolen U.S. intellectual property and dumped goods on the American market in violation of U.S. law. Meanwhile, Beijing has regularly subsidized strategic industries such as telecommunications and energy, required foreign firms to transfer their technology in exchange for access to the Chinese market, and manipulated its currency to create artificial trade advantages for Chinese companies.

Beijing got away with this behavior because it permitted remarkably low wages and dismal working conditions. By exploiting its people's poverty, Communist leaders lured foreign money, particularly into manufacturing. Labor costs have since skyrocketed in China, but the U.S. still acquiesced on trade.

For years Beijing was accommodated by U.S. presidents from both parties, all unwilling to take a hard stand. Regrettably, America's allies also followed the path of appeasement. China has lied, cheated and stolen its way to a massive trade surplus, which it has used to fuel a dramatic increase in military expenditures and strategic infrastructure investment in East Asia and beyond.

Mr. Trump recognized that the only way to make U.S.-China trade fair is to force Beijing to the table. By imposing stiff tariffs, the president put an end to appeasement. In the process, American voters have turned against Beijing. Simultaneously, the administration crafted bilateral trade deals with Japan and South Korea along with the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement. China has seen America's economic clout and this administration's willingness to wield it.**[Read More](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njhduky-akrkktjik-r/)** [DONATE NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njhduky-akrkktjik-y/) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njhduky-akrkktjik-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njhduky-akrkktjik-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njhduky-akrkktjik-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-njhduky-akrkktjik-d/)

name: Mary Mancini
subject: 01/11-01/17 TNDP Weekly Recap: Republicans on the Run
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Tennessee Democrats, we have Republicans on the run. When a reporter asked Tennessee Republican Party Chair Scott Golden what opportunities they have in 2020, he said, "We’re certainly looking for places to be offensive, but quite frankly most of our efforts for the last three, four election cycles have been mainly defensive."

It’s not surprising, considering Republican priorities.

Tennessee ranks 43rd in public health, 35th in education, and 41st in economic opportunity. Yet this week, the first week of the state legislative session, Republicans wasted no time pushing unnecessary and cruel legislation, passing a bill to keep loving same sex couples from adopting a child with no family or home. Not only does this bill harm orphaned children and our LGTBQ+ neighbors, it also damages Tennessee’s economy by painting the state as discriminatory and making our state less attractive to potential employers.

Tennessee has the highest number of minimum wage jobs, yet Republican Senator Brian Kelsey and gang are set to introduce an amendment to enshrine “right to work” into our constitution.

“Right to work” is legislation designed to strip rights away from working people by making it harder for them to form unions and collectively bargain for better wages, benefits, and conditions. It also gives businesses the upper hand and few consequences for unjustly firing workers. Tennessee has been a “right to work” state for more than 70 years. Now, instead of focusing on improving the lives of working families, Republicans are pushing to make this regressive “right to work” policy part of the Tennessee's constitution.

Rather than hurting our children, our families and our workers, all to push a divisive partisan agenda, Republicans should have begun this legislative session with an eye towards helping Tennesseeans. Instead of Republican politicians, the people of Tennessee need elected leaders that will pass laws to improve their lives.

Standing with Tennessee,

Mary Mancini , Tennessee Democratic Party Chair

TNDP INTRODUCES NEW
COMMUNICATIONS DIRECTOR

The Tennessee Democratic Party is excited to welcome and announce Emily Cupples as the Party’s Director of Communications. Cupples will work closely with individual county parties, elected officials, current candidates, Democrats, and the media to project the message of Tennessee’s Democratic Party on all fronts.

“Emily has the right skills and experience to make a major impact this cycle. We’re excited to have her join the team as we work hard to win elections in 2020.” – Mary Mancini, TNDP Party Chair

Cupples has a background in communication, marketing, and politics. Most recently from West Tennessee, Cupples spent 5 years as a founding team member of the Memphis branding campaign, Choose901, and was the founding director of its sister campaign, Teach901. She also worked on several local and state political campaigns including Tami Sawyer’s breakthrough County Commission race. Cupples is the Director of Communications for the Memphis Women’s March, was named to the Memphis Chamber Young Memphian 2018, and received a national Education Pioneers fellowship.

DNC DELEGATES
The Tennessee Democratic Party is preparing now to select our Delegation to the 2020 Presidential Convention in Milwaukee, to be held the week of July 13, 2020. If you’re a dedicated Democrat who wants to serve your community, county, district, and state, then we welcome you to run to be a delegate for your preferred candidate and join us as a 2020 Presidential Convention Delegate to take your part in history!

We'll be hosting a series of workshops across the state to explain the process for becoming a delegate. Make sure you follow us on Facebook to stay up-to-date on locations and time.

The deadline to apply to be DNC Delegate is February 20th. Visit TNDP's website for more details.

TRUMP'S BROKEN PROMISES AND LIES ABOUT THE ECONOMY
As they do in Tennessee, Trump and his Washington Republicans are passing laws that hurt the working class.
Nearly two-thirds of Americans say they aren’t any better off financially than they were at the start of Trump’s presidency, and more Americans say Trump’s economy is hurting them and their families than say it’s helping.

58% of Americans say the current economy is hurting the middle class, while only 32% say it’s helping, according to Pew Research.

Job growth has slowed dramatically, and 2019 was the slowest year for job growth since 2011.

For the first time in decades, America’s billionaires paid a lower tax rate in 2018 than the working class

ELECTION NEWS: 291 DAYS TO GO
Stories to Watch 2020: The Tennessee Democrats“ We’re certainly looking for places to be offensive, but quite frankly most of our efforts for the last three, four election cycles have been mainly defensive,” says Scott Golden, chair of the Tennessee Republican Party.

CONTRIBUTE TO THE TNDP
Thank you! Your contribution sustains our work to recruit and train excellent candidates, build out effective campaigns, build the infrastructure necessary to invest in and mobilize our county parties (our boots on the ground!), and win elections.

name: Team Sri
subject: a shameful record of voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWCjraWqcOo_pe_mF_rMYfLobGTDzloOEX-EGhMIPaM=/JxA31qmFjdd5dsDq9wrAbew4UVRtI_SoKtEdvCwbKhM=)
---
Team,

Shameful. That is the most appropriate word to describe what the state of Texas is doing to suppress votes.

Over the last decade and a half, our state has seen some of the harshest, most restrictive requirements and purges of our voter rolls, and lawmakers maliciously using the specter of in-person voter fraud to justify passage of laws to disenfranchise hundreds of thousands of voters.

And despite a federal appeals court finding that our extremely restrictive voter ID law amounted to racial discrimination, the false narrative of voter fraud persists in Texas and continues to negatively impact voters.

Before he was forced to resign earlier this year, our previous Secretary of State David Whitley tried to remove 95,000 supposed non-citizens from the voter rolls, and alleged 58,000 had voted in at least one election. Emails were then released that showed the noncitizen voter purge campaign originated in the office of Governor Greg Abbott. And just days ago Texas was hit with a third voting rights lawsuit filed by national and Texas Democrats over our secretary of state's rejection of more than 2,400 registration applications filled out by voters using Vote.org.

Our campaign is all about bringing a multilingual (at least 13!), multigenerational, multicultural approach, with our dedicated volunteers, in our rapidly changing district. We cannot continue to shut out voters and hope that our country magically improves. It's about putting in the work to bring out disenfranchised voters, to bring out communities who have never been approached, communities who help to make up Texas' 22nd congressional district and so many others that we will fight to flip this year.

**[If you stand with Sri and know that it's not just about quashing phony voter fraud claims but about ensuring that we reach underrepresented communities, add your name to our petition and commit to protecting the vote in 2020 and beyond.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWCjraWqcOo_pe_mF_rMYfLobGTDzloOEX-EGhMIPaM=/JxA31qmFjdd5dsDq9wrAbew4UVRtI_SoKtEdvCwbKhM=)**

According to the Brennan Center, phony voter fraud claims are finally starting to lose their power in Texas, that's likely a harbinger for the nation. This is not to say our fight against voter suppression is over -- far from it. We have to fight harder and ensure that we're protecting voting rights and fighting disinformation at the polls.

In the coming year, our president is likely to continue to exploit fear around voting, not to mention the fact our future president will likely make multiple nominations to the Supreme Court that will have an impact on voting rights for generations to come.

We must head into this year armed with every available protection against voter suppression.

**[Will you add your name to Sri's petition and commit to the fight to protect our voting rights?](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWCjraWqcOo_pe_mF_rMYfLobGTDzloOEX-EGhMIPaM=/JxA31qmFjdd5dsDq9wrAbew4UVRtI_SoKtEdvCwbKhM=)**

Thank you for standing with us,

Team Sri | | **[ADD YOUR NAME ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWCjraWqcOo_pe_mF_rMYfLobGTDzloOEX-EGhMIPaM=/JxA31qmFjdd5dsDq9wrAbew4UVRtI_SoKtEdvCwbKhM=)**
---

**STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT** **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWCjraWqcOo_pe_mF_rMYfLobGTDzloOEX-EGhMIPaM=/xwJKREGxeelt9T5dq8tjrCLDYpaD2yROCzKFzGZbVJM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWCjraWqcOo_pe_mF_rMYfLobGTDzloOEX-EGhMIPaM=/ab0XY7vkgXcmJ4NDk9jZTAbqcZD12bepT7S3kAR28oU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWCjraWqcOo_pe_mF_rMYfLobGTDzloOEX-EGhMIPaM=/ojkauZeclsdgdJ1X4fGrZLMyd_w-wf0JDfg3sIPTqNI=)** | Paid for by Sri for Congress.

We think these stickers would look great on laptops, water bottles, your car, and anywhere you could think of. Even more importantly, it shows your friends, family, and neighbors that you’re part of J.D. Scholten’s team.

If you’re a student, you can let your friends know how J.D. will make sure our schools are well funded and our teachers are well-paid with good benefits, and shouldn’t have to use their own paycheck to supply their classrooms or leave for higher pay in other school districts.

If you’re a farmer, you can tell your neighbors how J.D. is fighting for a level playing field for all farmers to make a profit and enforce antitrust policies.

If you’re someone who’s ready to get Steve King out of office, you can show off your J.D. stickers anywhere and everywhere and tell folks why it’s time to elect a candidate who will stand tall for all.

name: Bill Olson
subject: This is how we win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iJwEXIkcUl6OuRU&b=ds.97TJP29hOkRM5dz2TDQ

Hi Peter

I get asked often how Trump and the Republicans will win this year.

I respond: "HAVE YOU SEEN THE SIZE OF THE CROWDS HE DRAWS???"

Seriously, whenever Trump goes someplace, he packs stadiums. Our side is MUCH more enthusiastic than the morbid Dems.

The 90-minute Trump campaign rally held in Toledo, Ohio, on January 9 continued a trend that had held firmly in recent months — 42.8 percent of the 22,927 people attending the event were either a Democrat or an Independent.

Broken down, 21.9 percent were Democrats and 20.9 percent of attendees identified as Independents.

These figures continue a trend stretching back to last October 17, when 21.4 percent at a Trump rally in Dallas were Democrats, with 11 percent being Latino.

Twenty-seven percent of those attending a Trump rally in Tupelo, Mississippi, on November 1 were Democrats, with 20 percent being black. At a November 26 Trump rally in Broward, Florida, 24 percent of attendees were Democrats, with 27 percent being Hispanic.

Our side is going to win!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iJwEXIkcUl6OuRU&b=ds.97TJP29hOkRM5dz2TDQ
Trump is drawing 42% non-Republicans to his rallies. If that holds to Election day, there is no way we can lose.

To heck with CNN and their garbage propaganda polls. Believe your eyes.

2020 is going to be an epic year for Trump and the Republicans. Can you help me win in Florida's 8th?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iJwEXIkcUl6OuRU&b=ds.97TJP29hOkRM5dz2TDQ

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iJwEXIkcUl6OuRU&b=ds.97TJP29hOkRM5dz2TDQ
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I need your help to oust the dangerous Dems from Congress. The numbers are there for us to win! Let's send "woke" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iJwEXIkcUl6OuRU&b=ds.97TJP29hOkRM5dz2TDQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iJwEXIkcUl6OuRU&b=ds.97TJP29hOkRM5dz2TDQ

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iJwEXIkcUl6OuRU&b=ds.97TJP29hOkRM5dz2TDQ
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

Early voting begins in Minnesota today, which means that starting now, **people are casting a ballot for Elizabeth _every single day_ until the end of this primary.**

We need to make sure we're doing everything we can -- every day -- to reach out to those voters. That work starts with the grassroots donations we receive from supporters like you.

>
We've spent the last year building a campaign centered around big ideas that will inspire people -- to believe in their power to shape their democracy, to get off the sidelines, and to come out and vote for change.

But to see our hard work pay off, we need to continue to meet people where they're at, bring them into our movement, and inspire them to vote for Elizabeth.

Whether that's by sharing a conversation with an organizer on their front porch, seeing an ad of Elizabeth talking about what her plans could mean for them, or getting a call from a volunteer about where their polling place is, **that all starts with you**.

Because Elizabeth relies on your support to make this campaign possible.

**[So now that we've entered this next phase of this primary, can you please pitch in $2 or anything you can today to help power this campaign to victory?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a5b8/45c30650/1ed0481fb/66fe4198/3291124206/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU43OEZfRUdSX0dSTV9XXzIwMjAwMTE3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN78F_EGR_GRM_W_20200117_V1S1_P")**

clean_body: Early voting begins in Minnesota today, which means that starting now, people are casting a ballot for Elizabeth every single day until the end of this primary. | | | "" Early voting begins in Minnesota today, which means that starting now, people are casting a ballot for Elizabeth every single day until the end of this primary. We need to make sure we're doing everything we can -- every day -- to reach out to those voters. That work starts with the grassroots donations we receive from supporters like you. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" We've spent the last year building a campaign centered around big ideas that will inspire people -- to believe in their power to shape their democracy, to get off the sidelines, and to come out and vote for change. But to see our hard work pay off, we need to continue to meet people where they're at, bring them into our movement, and inspire them to vote for Elizabeth. Whether that's by sharing a conversation with an organizer on their front porch, seeing an ad of Elizabeth talking about what her plans could mean for them, or getting a call from a volunteer about where their polling place is, that all starts with you. Because Elizabeth relies on your support to make this campaign possible. "" LFG, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

URGENT, Peter: **As of tomorrow we have just ONE MONTH LEFT until early voting begins in the Texas primary!** That's just one month to make sure every Texas voter knows why MJ is the best candidate to take on and _defeat_ Sen. John Cornyn.

Since launching this campaign, MJ has traveled more than 11,000 miles and spoken with _thousands_ of Texans about the issues affecting their families. But **there are a lot of undecided voters left and we need to reach them** before they cast their votes!

**To stay on track, we 're announcing a One Month Out Fund with a goal of raising $30,000 by tomorrow night. [Will you rush a donation right now to help MJ win the Texas primary and go on to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890724/7f51f7bc/4a9a29e7/4ef0031a/3425227468/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-one-month-out?refcode=email_20200117.1nd__766__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Every single goal we set is a critical piece of our larger campaign plan, Peter. MJ isn't taking money from corporate PACs, and she doesn't have a nearly $11 million stockpile like Sen. Cornyn does. She's relying on this grassroots team every step of the way.

**So during crucial moments like this, your help is all the more important. With just one month left until early voting begins, will you donate to help us reach our $30,000 goal and make sure MJ is the candidate who takes on -- and BEATS -- Sen. Cornyn?**

name: Dan Rowe, Powered By People
subject: We don’t want to wish we had done more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
Last weekend we knocked on 12,000 doors to turn out voters for Eliz
Markowitz. She’s running in the most critical special election in the
state of Texas, and early voting starts on Tuesday. We don’t have much
time left, so we’re hosting another huge weekend of action starting
TONIGHT.

Winning this seat unlocks a much greater chance to flip the Texas
legislature from Republican control. It also opens the door to winning an
additional six U.S. House seats. That’s why this is so important. We have
to win here.

But organizing volunteers to win elections requires resources: not only
for the canvassing and data tools that we use to organize the event, but
for the food, drinks, gas, and more that we help volunteers with.

We need your help to fund this critical organizing work. The national
implications are massive. This weekend alone, we’re hoping to improve on
our numbers from last week, and get 500 volunteers mobilized.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42120?refcode=ema20200117-77304&t=1019&akid=77304%2E444211%2ErPu_0P ]Can you chip in to help Powered By People flip the Texas legislature
and win this special election with Eliz Markowitz? Your contributions are
SO important to our efforts.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42120?refcode=ema20200117-77304&t=1020&akid=77304%2E444211%2ErPu_0P ]Donate $3

This is a big opportunity — not just for us, but for Texas and all of
America. I don’t want us to have any regrets. If we lose by 20 or 40
votes, I don’t want to look back and think we could have done more.

We know the doors we knock will be the margin of victory here in Fort
Bend. That means your support — whether it’s inviting your Texas friends
to join, or chipping in a few bucks to fuel our volunteer mobilization —
can and will be the deciding factor.

Together, we have what it takes to pull this off. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42120?refcode=ema20200117-77304&t=1021&akid=77304%2E444211%2ErPu_0P ]So, please, if
you’ve been waiting to contribute to Powered By People, now’s a great time
to pitch in.

Thank you,

Dan Rowe
Powered By People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42120?refcode=ema20200117-77304&t=1022&akid=77304%2E444211%2ErPu_0P ]Donate $3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=77304%2E444211%2ErPu_0P

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

subject: Pelosi’s little impeachment party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
In response to Pelosi and House Democrats tone-deaf move, we are launching our own impeachment souvenir pens!

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats said impeachment was a 'solemn duty.' They even went so far as to wear all black clothing to make a point. **_But did you see what they did RIGHT AFTER finally sending Articles of Impeachment to the Senate? Pelosi actually REWARDED House Democrats with impeachment PENS engraved with her signature ...served on a silver platter._**

Yes, you read that right...Pelosi actually handed out pens to her supporters to commemorate their impeachment of our President of the United States.

**In response to Pelosi and House Democrats little impeachment celebration, we are launching our own impeachment souvenir pens! ****[**Get your pens NOW to commemorate when we finally put an end to the Democrats' rushed impeachment.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ojkEEltusMvNwTq94On-UXa-pdBbQpxcyJ_NxyPyYTICS1g1BV66wEP1X9MiECkM8CUFO_VWCNfVUZIgppjcwDoBZPq6CqMchJXkFZGU83a4XIqaXUuIg9iZrpDVN2N9v_6CgZqouAMulzjCDhK4hprz3wp4t_4beKbPDN5mEkjuLVW_dfbXJmfBpLDKFOgeUiQlMdusYLewuq1LU5w4F2c4EE2oUEtLuZ6DfonHGUOIIimiRlCcIdBj_4_n2hgHI9ZOLTD19LycdGfk6hMv-eZCmBvBZh-zf-WNlBiraGZY5ji5PJw22sXbzxDa7OV11rBBqlsEpgZdeO4bWClghqQPT06M9auPbETcgEdQa50Iwj9cqwrEvibI67OQ9Nyktg8sYYrNpVb4RIIhXmLVBQeHX-0f6zk5Kf8Bhwt7ep9-SzEithrbEaX5vatDDYclLiB0_F5pmF0sjSanV9-uxA==&c=poeNq3RCsMgVS_Iwd4G3bWkSOhKaENtkRe4ii43bCkXj7T5DjEGzKA==&ch=-qC_6tmOlmPz9l0Ow5WjTKMOiJY57zBMG6ioK9J-MRiCN_iG4VTtzA==)**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: ICYMI: Governor Holcomb's State of the State Address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb gave his annual State of the State address. Unsurprisingly, the Governor's speech was all about his passion - _“My fellow Hoosiers, we’ve become known around the world as ‘A State that Works.’ I want Indiana to become known as ‘A State that Works for All.’ Where every citizen – no matter their background or age or who they love or whether they grew up here or arrived last week – has equal access and opportunity to go as far as they wish and are willing to work to get there. That’s what I’ll continue to fight for.”_ _ _ **-Governor Eric Holcomb, 2020 State of the State** | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8b9e71df52114d519e06dda014fbf61a&_e=YQEaduhoy9IBBtQUqJh4KxR0tp-DOnezWVnb-HktsMfGmCXNhx5TyJqt3WKlYfDNKAnPzZ63s3lPFOFRB0yBooGivyWcLCIn0ozcA1Y0bGEPOTATvs0hTNlNCJBiINcWDCKuzwwwpHQq1Zetwt5GpOdFlRe8wED5Q5tPQAIzzevXQsaJGLm10rgwQvps5jSJMFFx3fLGben_j3Kcq0cTklvs3xdN5bt5j-Vyy_4o0ylmlSFAKM-QiTnHAHGs9HN2h5Ckz31IqGvdQnuBWA1zM2GbjyUgHz9iL0l7DNm0rIzUSghFYYnrbzoD4joXg3VkYFEVhNhmzRdaGtBvWHRDhsgslZN5t4uKqsldB8XHMXy-dQb49eAMkH2mMxy6Vr0-FBP7zWH2o9bWHlWks98Y6BwNZ0BP8MbmV2PrKOaP7g4%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb gave his annual State of the State address.

Unsurprisingly, the Governor’s speech was all about his passion — **Putting People First.** The Governor laid out his vision for Indiana’s future and touched on the major successes we’ve had over the past year.

It’d be impossible to include everything (**[if you’re interested, you can watch the whole speech here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8b9e71df52114d519e06dda014fbf61a&_e=YQEaduhoy9IBBtQUqJh4KxR0tp-DOnezWVnb-HktsMfGmCXNhx5TyJqt3WKlYfDNKAnPzZ63s3lPFOFRB0yBooGivyWcLCIn0ozcA1Y0bGEPOTATvs0hTNlNCJBiINcWDCKuzwwwpHQq1Zetwt5GpOdFlRe8wED5Q5tPQAIzzevXQsaJGLm10rgwQvps5jSJMFFx3fLGben_j3Kcq0cTkjk5blhUYoJFhm6-waq41KlzvArUqsKtdQKZv7ZY9AbbUriPoJ-a7LmN1f_gWMH02JkXL6NslBEWYPeTcxWgn5wKEWKTk8sw8ePvs7F066Z0CQ5fFCnp-WOY4-6HSWrf7gCmH_uY2uJTuiteDg8Y9zxqEpyxGro6LRIMDgGe2n_PubMdMQwCPF0F89k-Rs7SiRET17GHWr7zNXsWA_JQqfg%3D)**), but we thought we’d share some of the biggest highlights below.

Governor Holcomb highlighted how we’ve helped Hoosier kids thrive and discussed how we could do more in 2020, including:
* Bringing the infant mortality rate to a 12-year low in 2019.
* Working to find permanent homes for Hoosier children when parental rights have been terminated.
* Cutting the time it takes to adopt to under a year

Governor Holcomb also doubled down on his commitment to Hoosier educators and students, including:
* Recommending that the General Assembly direct an additional **$250 million toward teacher retirement funds in the next budget, which would make an extra $50 million per year available for boosting teacher pay.**
* Freeing up an additional **$115 million per year for teacher pay in the current budget.**

Governor Holcomb also pledged to reduce administrative burdens on our teachers and make sure schools have the resources they need by:
* Working with the K-12 community to eliminate unnecessary paperwork.
* Making sure every school has a relationship with a mental health provider in order to help ensure every student can thrive

The Governor also committed to making sure Hoosiers can afford being healthy by:
* Committing to an "All-Payer Claims Database," an important first step toward giving Hoosiers more transparency in health care costs.
* Requiring that providers give a good-faith cost estimate **five days before care is provided.**
* Requiring that in-network facilities provide care at the network rate.

The Governor also discussed the huge wins for Hoosier workers in 2019 (and what they have to look forward to in 2020), including:
* Fiat-Chrysler investing $400 million to diversify its facility in Kokomo
* Our new goal of **tripling defense investment in Indiana by 2025.**
* Our efforts helping Hoosiers skill-up for high-wage, in-demand jobs.
* The number of Hoosiers with higher education has increased **by 10 percentage points since 2008.**
* More than **23,000 Hoosiers have enrolled in Workforce Ready Programs (like Next Level Jobs) in the past three years.**

The Governor also highlighted our efforts to turn offenders into neighbors again, including:
* The more than 3,000 inmates that have now graduated from certified programs in two years.
* Supporting legislation that makes the education available to offenders more holistic – incentivizing addiction recovery treatment, mental health management, and vocational development.

The Governor covered a lot in his speech and Hoosiers have a lot to be proud of. We accomplished a lot in 2019 and there are great things on the horizon in 2020. If you want to stay up to date on the progress we’re making towards these goals and more, please consider following Governor Holcomb on social media.

[ **Like Governor Holcomb on Facebook** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8b9e71df52114d519e06dda014fbf61a&_e=YQEaduhoy9IBBtQUqJh4KxR0tp-DOnezWVnb-HktsMcdU17I79nppmKXy0WjC1CXXiwN2xLDvGOqYsE5tOfv2v2NgNrpV045oUs2F0QSQ_y6uRQY7n9U4U1fuT_C6DdRgPsCZ311YrWxJNigzX3FyBEIaBb6jp0NSnESExbjqGH5zGW0htr-WJ9Pu9FoQoNk8NxRPbR-dN4z3XZeT0vWUf4IQdgyXqqAvlc4MnMvSrUn9W6GR7T_iY7t7iKmhpPCjSDAGT7MbDth9plb6F-1XhrWov6SR5mX-pR21ANN6xuCYqdDqrGTWLhclWHW9nUXNnXokCPrj_CH68-8z-R5t8Uhcd_D7J5Uo2paP4XKNdbWgnW9A39bUefdHVyrMAYepVCIxRNC_uzPV_vS9dyc9Q%3D%3D)
[ **Like Governor Holcomb on Twitter** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8b9e71df52114d519e06dda014fbf61a&_e=YQEaduhoy9IBBtQUqJh4KySCkm9LeeN0pWa3R6DPJqbldGXaIvO99r-Wsf4G6qqRzxKR50kDwEq3gDqUymy-aZBMtUHiL1-vPMJAtfey9HX7P2hM6nTP8Q5ppNqFl2FSUb9tC3dkITlFfsnM9zutGfYrXlL8MWYye0dPLIjz0pzW3hwYWZ47yclQ8cBmgg_vxOmQzumzJzXl-lXwK2KWi0iFJpIwmFsSChG9vgQDRlY3qAxTI2NdRLWmJ8mXXvZQyZZbVyOLF6-0sRPH4ofBmEB2U1S8XyNlh_1D6mj47a1mIT0M-IPi6K99OfmrDa4Sln6qJY4NVUhGnXBW5kFbhUXTwpaDbnbw1_apUu666UBuhIy4yLaHnjfofaO4qSFcdKOBJM4pJL6NyELeA7d7KlmOu_NrCdzDKz9qGOwgvNhksf3PrCXxHkVtZJXUWYfACxZ21KYayPoQnnqpPHqljQ%3D%3D)
[ **Like Governor Holcomb on Instagram** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8b9e71df52114d519e06dda014fbf61a&_e=YQEaduhoy9IBBtQUqJh4K2KV9bN_SBdVqAzXRh-clDEGymTZSC8zPkHhDRjaXTjeKqDrygvA27mTD9IZ5BRgAS48d2EmPrlIq3Ym41OCk1cYwe2Hj0t0XTRXb_EkBttO-VQ5Tzjp2wVQXsdLy1oBLkdx9MP1xpDmRc0y7oGkl7WjyRDcf4ORMaM1qv-CA8CIhKcVGe_8iGVX3pxhkawJFzNm9ZzsbJKLo12Ff86dTNjUujemJjrMNWh12_MjH0rSt75zJLa2oUq4K5y8Xj5eViOcyfdIVH-MDq_f8TaReWfbR1wde2WqFBgUXoZwRUzcrbCT9ergNKqQcURjv3BtPEkH8FIXpechhhN2WFyN7vpVZ95uS2OzJf626fkEn5n7ImmKhA-hc3-cRZbSbw1Hzg%3D%3D)
Sincerely,

Holcomb Crew

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Courts halt Wisconsin voter purge -- FOR NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, An appeals court in Wisconsin has issued a temporary stay against a GOP partisan move that would strike more than 200,000 people from the voter rolls. But the GOP could still prevail, and these 200,000 voters could be stricken from the voting records. Trump won Wisconsin in 2016 by just 0.77%, fewer than 23,000 votes. A purge of 200,000 voters mostly in Dem-leaning cities could easily mean Trump wins Winsconsin again, potentially handing him another 4 years in the White House. In 2016, millions of voters were discouraged or intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Michigan by just 0.23% and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. They're trying to make this happen again in 2020. That's why we need to know if your voting plans have changed: **Do you plan to vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdffb/6e9863e8/17fc850a/1db05e63/3254396741/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Ms0JKwLz") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdffb/6e9863e8/17fc850a/1db05e63/3254396741/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Ms0JKwLz") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdffb/6e9863e8/17fc850a/1db05e63/3254396741/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Ms0JKwLz")

name: Monika Johnson-Hostler
subject: Why I am running for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am running to flip this district blue and stand up for everyday Americans

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d998/7dfbb003/42abeda2/5527c014/3867428478/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191114_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191114_em_experience&source=rtw_20191114_em_experience")
---
Friend,
I am running for Congress in North Carolina's new 2nd district. This seat is one of the best pick up opportunites that Democrats have in 2020. I am going to ask you to support me, but first I want to tell you about me and why I decided to step up and run for Congress. I was born and raised right here in North Carolina. I grew up in a small town called Thomasville, where my grandparents and single mother took care of me. I watched every morning when they would walk to the furniture factory down the road. They worked long hours for too little pay. They knew the barriers and struggles that held back so many families, so many children here in North Carolina. Growing up and living through Jim Crow, they fought through constant discrimination and racism. But they envisioned a future where I had great opportunities, opportunities that they never had. In doing so, they taught me the value of hard work and to be the solution. I have spent my entire career trying to be apart of the solution. For the past 20 years I have been the Executive Director of the North Carolina Coalition Against Sexual Assault, during that time President Obama apppointed me to the National Advisory Committee on Violence Against Women. I also serve as the President of the National Coalition Against Sexual Violence and I co-aouthord the 2013 reauthorization of the Violence Against Women Act while securing nearly $600 million in anti sexual violence, domestic violence, and Title IX funding. March 3rd is my Election Day and we are fighting hard to be successful. Because I want to keep leading the fight to better our country, for everyone. But I need your help. I think we deserve a fighting chance, and that starts with you. clean_body: I am running to flip this district blue and stand up for everyday Americans | "" Friend, I am running for Congress in North Carolina's new 2nd district. This seat is one of the best pick up opportunites that Democrats have in 2020. I am going to ask you to support me, but first I want to tell you about me and why I decided to step up and run for Congress. I was born and raised right here in North Carolina. I grew up in a small town called Thomasville, where my grandparents and single mother took care of me. I watched every morning when they would walk to the furniture factory down the road. They worked long hours for too little pay. They knew the barriers and struggles that held back so many families, so many children here in North Carolina. Growing up and living through Jim Crow, they fought through constant discrimination and racism. But they envisioned a future where I had great opportunities, opportunities that they never had. In doing so, they taught me the value of hard work and to be the solution. I have spent my entire career trying to be apart of the solution. For the past 20 years I have been the Executive Director of the North Carolina Coalition Against Sexual Assault, during that time President Obama apppointed me to the National Advisory Committee on Violence Against Women. I also serve as the President of the National Coalition Against Sexual Violence and I co-aouthord the 2013 reauthorization of the Violence Against Women Act while securing nearly $600 million in anti sexual violence, domestic violence, and Title IX funding. March 3rd is my Election Day and we are fighting hard to be successful. Because I want to keep leading the fight to better our country, for everyone. But I need your help. I think we deserve a fighting chance, and that starts with you. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Best Regards, Monika Johnson Hostler Candidate for Congress, North Carolina District 2

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14015245/146356765/1525607060?refcode=Em_fr_2020.01.17_b1_AH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZThjODU3ZS03NzM5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKl-gD9OBTVMoUBQ66xFIMjjy-AHIcTk8zzAZYRpuOY=)
---
| Hey Peter,

When I pledged to run a campaign free from corporate PAC money, it was an easy decision for me. Unlike most candidates, I don’t come from very much money. From my childhood up through proudly serving our country, I’ve learned the value of a dollar and how much power it can hold. **That power should be reserved only for my fellow countrymen — not for DC special interest groups trying to buy our elections.**

FL-15 has already seen what dark money can buy — a corrupt, scandal-ridden official who couldn’t care less about the people he supposedly represents. **Corporate PAC money has no place in Florida politics and I’m proud to say it has no place in our campaign either.**

[**Although we reject corporate PAC money, it’s unfortunately coming for us. Ross Spano and his corporate, dark-money owners are already flooding our district with hyper-partisan smears. Can I count on you to help defend our district against this?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14015246/146356766/-409648012?refcode=Em_fr_2020.01.17_b1_AH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZThjODU3ZS03NzM5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKl-gD9OBTVMoUBQ66xFIMjjy-AHIcTk8zzAZYRpuOY=) | ****[CONTRIBUTE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14015247/146356767/1525607060?refcode=Em_fr_2020.01.17_b1_AH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZThjODU3ZS03NzM5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKl-gD9OBTVMoUBQ66xFIMjjy-AHIcTk8zzAZYRpuOY=)****

clean_body: = | Hey Peter, When I pledged to run a campaign free from corporate PAC money, it was an easy decision for me. Unlike most candidates, I don’t come from very much money. From my childhood up through proudly serving our country, I’ve learned the value of a dollar and how much power it can hold. That power should be reserved only for my fellow countrymen — not for DC special interest groups trying to buy our elections. FL-15 has already seen what dark money can buy — a corrupt, scandal-ridden official who couldn’t care less about the people he supposedly represents. Corporate PAC money has no place in Florida politics and I’m proud to say it has no place in our campaign either. = | **= It’s time we had someone who listened to the real needs of our district. With your help, we can make this a reality in 2020. She is a Senator who we can rely on for the truth and honest answers. **We cannot let her voice disappear from Washington.

That's why we need you to join Team Collins right away.

[Your donation will go instantly towards her campaign and ensure Susan has the financial support needed to win in November.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE1NjU2NDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTYwNDQxOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you for supporting Susan. It's going to be a long road ahead, but together we can win this! Our future is worth fighting for!

All the best,
Team Collins

Law Enforcement Appreciation Day should be recognized every day in our communities. We are thankful for the sacrifices made by those who answer the call to serve in this noble profession. Political leaders in Albany have enacted dangerous laws under the guise of reform that put our communities and those who serve at risk.

Sadly, towns and cities within New York’s 22nd Congressional District have been ranked among the most dangerous in New York in terms of recent crime rate statistics. Politicians in Albany and Washington must act now to repeal and amend those laws to protect our citizens and law enforcement officials, not put them at greater risk.

| Peter,
I wanted to send you a quick message to make sure you know what's been happening along the campaign trail. We had another busy and eventful week.
On Monday, we announced that we continue to lead the field in fundraising, putting us in a great position to take on Colin Allred in the November election.
---
| Tuesday evening, we had our first District 32 candidate forum, and the feedback we've received has been overwhelmingly positive. I'm definitely looking forward to the next opportunity to get on stage with my opponents and make the case for why I'm the best choice to represent this great district.
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| This week, I also received another big endorsement, this one from former State Rep. Dan Branch:
"Genevieve Collins is an effective conservative whose private sector leadership has expanded our state's educated workforce. North Texans expect thoughtful solutions and constructive results, not empty rhetoric and political stunts."
---
| | |
---
| Finally, we opened our new campaign headquarters last night, and it was a major success. Thank you to all who attended! If you couldn't make it, you can click below to check out some photos from the event.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, I wanted to send you a quick message to make sure you know what's been happening along the campaign trail. We had another busy and eventful week. On Monday, we announced that we continue to lead the field in fundraising, putting us in a great position to take on Colin Allred in the November election. | Tuesday evening, we had our first District 32 candidate forum, and the feedback we've received has been overwhelmingly positive. I'm definitely looking forward to the next opportunity to get on stage with my opponents and make the case for why I'm the best choice to represent this great district. | | | | | | This week, I also received another big endorsement, this one from former State Rep. Dan Branch: "Genevieve Collins is an effective conservative whose private sector leadership has expanded our state's educated workforce. North Texans expect thoughtful solutions and constructive results, not empty rhetoric and political stunts." | | | | Finally, we opened our new campaign headquarters last night, and it was a major success. Thank you to all who attended! If you couldn't make it, you can click below to check out some photos from the event. | == | Thank you for your support, and I look forward to seeing you out there on the campaign trail! | | Genevieve | | | == | == == == | | | == | | | Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc. | | Collins for Texas, Inc. | 6119A Greenville Ave., Ste 423, Dallas, TX 75206 | | Sent by mailto:info@gcforcongress.com

We’re more than halfway through January, and right now we’re still a little behind on our fundraising goal for the month. | | | Friend,
**** **** We’re more than halfway through January, and right now we’re still a little behind on our fundraising goal for the month. To be specific, we’re $4,132 from where we need to be. This is a crucial month for fundraising because we’re trying to budget for everything we need to spend over the next six months. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us catch up and get back on track?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_AA/ni0YAA/t.2yh/C_ScUPoZQ0eu2aqR8DutQA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIsVXV8-2BjxeAulo5pC7dRTERFu4YD3khdQFGKNyW593N-2BXC9wwHqpjWszh3tpnUYhsWq8NigJ8F2JC-2BNRLJrskZVSOHq8mpvUWQSVJCtzJ50UMi2MHtjCDAXrJ24lezpCMjkBgK-2FW6-2Fb-2Buw6cXds5-2B1u2Gj5KYQ4CKI9dSxEAt0urOnJqgegXX7Ax6M-2B2z76-2B10qOfHCCwFYIv9Bm4E1k6T/VcNl)_** [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_AA/ni0YAA/t.2yh/C_ScUPoZQ0eu2aqR8DutQA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIsVXV8-2BjxeAulo5pC7dRTERrD6v61XR8VMjQLJtk0yActlfxOHbrE8D0JJzLhRpNwj5OAAarjln7evu6Y9KHx26N5kVB5jqdKIMG4EwDyuFBl6p-2BeMYf6J6LKS78I26YYXhmNDwR4nnykwAW-2B9p7bIH4YPLc4HroBC0qRmigUwgvQKme5Q8r2ViWC0jciapBmJeBF4kVTJePU5AxDsXpZv/3-ib)
We’ve done a great job with fundraising so far, but we can’t slow down now. While we’ve raised half a million dollars, we will need to double that to be competitive in our race. That’s what it’s going to take to get our message out by expanding our field program, paying for digital ads, and sending mailers to every voter in the district.

name: 2020 Candidate Survey (via 314 Action)
subject: Have you checked out Pete Buttigieg's climate plan? -->
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| The most important part of our survey on climate action plans in the Democratic primary is your feedback. We want -- and need -- to hear from you.

Today, we need your opinion of Pete Buttigieg's three-part plan, **Rising to the Climate Challenge**. | | **_Mobilizing America: Rising to the Climate Challenge_ :**

- Step 1: Achieve net-zero emissions across the economy by 2050.
- Step 2: Invest in climate resilience through federal incentives and grants.
- Step 3: Return the federal government to a leading role in the global climate fight.
- And more...
---
[](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/buttigieg-climate-plan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1")
---
Pete Buttigieg's plan wouldn't just double clean energy's share of electricity generation and quadruple federal clean energy R&D funding by 2025 -- it would create more than 3 million high-quality U.S. jobs.

_[Now that you've read his plan, take our one-click survey and tell us if you support Pete Buttigieg's Rising to the Climate Challenge](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/buttigieg-climate-plan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Now+that+yoursquove+read+his+plan+take+o&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1")_:
| [Yes](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/buttigieg-climate-plan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Yes&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1")

Democratic presidential candidates are leading the way in the fight against the climate crisis.

Pete Buttigieg's three-part plan sets far-reaching goals and puts the United States on course for carbon neutrality by mid-century.

This rapid transformation of the U.S. economy would be fueled by American entrepreneurship, bold federal leadership, and a price on carbon (with that revenue going right back to the people).

**Do you support Pete Buttigieg 's climate plan?**
| [Yes](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/buttigieg-climate-plan?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Yes&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&refcode=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1")

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb405b/4bd7760e/46f26119/77ace2df/2253591131/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1&source=314_EM_SV_30OP_200117_3_1")** to make a donation.

Do you support Pete Buttigieg 's climate plan? | "" "" "" Thank you for making your voice heard, The 314 Team Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. "" 314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can "" to make a donation.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Washington is broken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
I'll be honest, folks. I never saw myself running for U.S. Senate. Back in the mid-1980s, I was laid off for 27 months as a geologist. Then, I took every scrap of savings in my bank account and took a gamble on opening my own business, a brewpub in downtown Denver. I remember working 80-hour weeks. I remember lying awake at night wondering how we were going to make it. And I remember being so angry that my government wasn't working for me. So, I ran for Mayor. And once elected, I focused every day on making decisions based on what was best for Denver. Then, I was elected Governor on the premise of uniting people, finding common ground, hashing things out, and getting things done. Now, I see how broken Washington is. I see politicians who only listen to those who cut big campaign checks while ignoring the rest of us. It's clear Colorado needs a different kind of Senator to get the job done. Here's why I'm telling you this: **my story is the reason I remain grounded amid the partisan politics and nonsense that 's happening in our government.** Because with all the chaos in Washington, you need somebody who will roll up their sleeves and get to work fighting to ensure the most vulnerable of us are being taken care of. **Like I said, I never thought I 'd run for Senate, but Coloradans deserve a leader they can trust to do right by them.** I'm just a geologist-turned-brewer who turned to public service to do what's right for the people of my state. Because of that, I don't take money from the corporate PACs a lot of politicians rely on. Instead, I rely on grassroots folks like you. That's why I'm depending on your contribution today to power this campaign across the finish line in November. Your $5 here or $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours. **So, I have to ask: will you make a donation of whatever is meaningful to you before our fundraising deadline ends at midnight? Together, we will flip Colorado 's Senate seat and put power back in the hands of the people:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200117-long?refcode=em-200117-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
