name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Pelosi critics are WRONG once again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In the weeks since the House impeached Trump, John Bolton has come forward to offer testimony to the Senate. Lev Parnas, Giuliani's close associate, handed over damning evidence further implicating the president and senior administration members in the Ukraine scandal, in addition to giving a ground-breaking interview. If Speaker Pelosi hadn't waited, McConnell's Senate could have pushed through a dismissal of charges or a sham trial before these new facts came to light. With the new evidence, GOP senators are finally breaking from their party leader, and we may actually get to hear from crucial witnesses. Speaker Pelosi is leading the charge against Republican obstruction and abuse of power, but she can't be the only one. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into the next election. We need to hear from you today: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdffd/6e9863e8/17fed443/1db05ed7/2570831001/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/OtULOfuE") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdffd/6e9863e8/17fed443/1db05ed7/2570831001/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/OtULOfuE") Thank you, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdffd/6e9863e8/17fed443/1db05ed7/2570831001/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/OtULOfuE")

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14018090/146390205/-1907457918?refcode=01102020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTUzMzU1ZC04ODM5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iq1g0tjg8prgRLs9OPcFNvXOVH5uBWeTbwHE9mQnKWk=)
---
Dear Friend, When I decided to run again in 2020, I vowed I wouldn't run the same campaign as last time. We are leveraging _every_ lesson-learned from 2018. One of the most important lessons was the need for accurate data. In 2018 we didn't (couldn't!) launch a poll until September. Not this time. We're about to launch a poll that will give us the data we need to be precise with our messaging and targeting through the primary and create the foundation for the general election. Since I now have _two_ primary opponents, and we want to avoid a runoff, we're launching this poll a little earlier than we had initially planned. Polling is expensive, and this is where you come in. We've got a cash flow gap we need to fill as quickly as we can. It should be pretty easy. In fact, if just 3% of the people receiving this email **[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14018091/146390206/1282640063?refcode=em_poll_line011720&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTUzMzU1ZC04ODM5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iq1g0tjg8prgRLs9OPcFNvXOVH5uBWeTbwHE9mQnKWk=)** or the button below and pitch in $5, we'll get over the top fast! | Hello, Team.

[Just before midnight last night, we hit our $700,000 goal!!! Not only that, but yesterday was also our best single day of fundraising since September!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab9b/134673f2/82ed48f/69974d6b/517580467/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We couldn't have done this without you, team, and Michael reached out to me this morning to make sure we personally thank you for your support.

[To build on the incredible momentum we've seen over the last few days, a generous group of donors have agreed to match all contributions up to $250 over the next 48 hours!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab9b/134673f2/82ed48f/69974d6b/517580467/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

This is the best opportunity we have to strike while the iron is hot.

[Every donation up to $250 will be doubled, allowing us to further expand the TV airtime for our ads.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab9b/134673f2/82ed48f/69974d6b/517580467/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011720_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Kathy Manning
subject: NC-06 will be more competitive than ever:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Our success hinges on what you do now.
|
---

| | The race for North Carolina's 6th is more competitive than ever, and now, there are _**less than two months left until the primary.**_ [_**Will you make a contribution to our campaign before our first deadline of 2020?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3e2/3d199a51/2f0aae8f/7364ec7d/2976750281/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDExNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200116?refcode=kme200116_nd_other&refcode2=17426") I have big plans for Washington. I want to: \- Protect access to **affordable health care**
\- Improve **public education**
\- Combat **gun violence**
\- Address **climate change**
\- Safeguard **women 's rights** But this race has a crowded field of candidates and I'm not taking a dime from corporate PACs. That's why I'm turning to you for help. [_**North Carolina 's 6th is a huge 2020 pick-up opportunity. We need the resources to run a strong campaign that can come out on top and that starts with reaching our $10,000 mid-month goal before midnight tonight. name: Annie Ellison
subject: Weigh in on our strategy with voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
This matters when it comes to flipping TX-21 from red to blue
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-messaging_strategy?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk50-su-nd")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-messaging_strategy?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk50-su-nd")
Hey, friend -
A lot of folks know Wendy from her 13-hour filibuster for reproductive rights on the floor of the Texas Senate - and that's great. But there's a whole lot more to Wendy's story, and our campaign is determined to share it. With your help.
**We 're asking a small group of Wendy's most committed supporters - including you, friend - to let us know what parts of Wendy's story we should share with voters. **

**[Take a quick peek at our messaging strategy- and leave your feedback on what pieces of Wendy's story you think will resonate most with voters. ](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-messaging_strategy?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk50-su-nd")**

Wendy's been fighting for women and families her entire career. If we get out there and connect with voters on the issues that matter, we can flip this Texas seat from red to blue and send Wendy to Congress.
But POLITICO is calling our House race one of the most competitive in the country - and that means it's crucial to hear from informed, engaged supporters like you to make our campaign the strongest it can be.
I put together a short slide deck - super quick, only five questions - that runs through the points we think will be most important to hit. **Will you take just two minutes to leave your feedback now?**
**[Click here, and let us know what you think Texas voters should know about Wendy Davis.>> ](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-messaging_strategy?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk50-su-nd")**

Really appreciate you taking the time,
Annie Ellison
Campaign Manager
Wendy Davis for Congress

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ade/704929dc/161e4706/39938fd5/2286257504/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ade/704929dc/161e4706/39938fd4/2286257504/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ade/704929dc/161e4706/39938fd7/2286257504/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Marc Featured in Local Newspaper
body:
Good afternoon Peter,

https://theleadernews.com/jackson-lee-facing-rare-fight-in-upcoming-primary/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927
Have you seen this?
Published Wednesday on The Leader's website (https://theleadernews.com/jackson-lee-facing-rare-fight-in-upcoming-primary/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927) and delivered to more than 50,000 homes this morning, Marc was featured in an article covering the the race in District 18.

For our campaign, this is big. So far, we have had very little media attention. This article, however, has many quotes from Marc, talking about the importance of this race, and the efforts we have put in to make sure that everyone in the district is heard and represented.

"We've been to every corner of the district...and people want change."

This article just goes to show the impact we've had so far. It quotes Marc saying, "We've been to literally every corner of the district, and the number one thing we're hearing is that people want change...They're ready for a new, younger vision and approach to the most important issues in our country."
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927
What the District Needs
District 18 needs a strong leader with reinvigorating energy and progressive ideals, who is also committed to the people and the community. Throughout this campaign, Marc and his team have traveled to every part of the district, finding out how they can make an impact, and then doing so.
What's Next?
We want to inform even more people about Marc, and reach out to more areas in the community to see how we can impact them.

To do this, we need your help. If you volunteer for a block walk (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/202379/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927) or phone bank (https://www.mobilize.us/dashboard/marcfloresforcongress/event/204323/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927) , we can reach people right away.
Donate $5 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927)
However, if you donate $5 or more right now, we can put together an advertisement that reaches at least 5,000 people. Please contribute today, so that we can keep up the momentum!

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c5ca74323e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c5ca74323e-32267927)

Thank you for your continued support,

Marc

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi?=
subject: Endorsements! 💥 Yard signs! 💥 Events!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're turning a corner in this campaign. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidifor25/endorsements-yard-signs-events?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| |
---
| | Hi ,

Running a grassroots Congressional campaign ain't easy, but this week has really been a good one. It started with us [winning the Austin Central Labor Council endorsement](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=47acad5f21&e=c169cb0a8e) \- one of this campaign's proudest achievements to date. We won this hard-earned endorsement by drafting the [most progressive labor platform in the country](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=58d71de9db&e=c169cb0a8e) among both candidates and sitting incumbents, by [standing with airline catering workers on the picket line](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=68556b2ef4&e=c169cb0a8e) (and getting arrested with them) back in November, and by championing labor even before seeking people's votes.

We also [mobilized 128 people to knock over 3,000 doors](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=71171f4ae5&e=c169cb0a8e) Sunday in our biggest canvass ever. In total **we've reached over 45,000 doors in the five months since we launched this campaign, and we have over 600 volunteers organizing to build the political revolution in Texas** with us. We're ramping up our ground game even more to reach our goal of 100,000 doors by the Primary, and so [we'll have canvasses every single day](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=e7548bb3b6&e=c169cb0a8e) between now and the election (most of them volunteer-led!).

As you may have read, [I was also cornered while I was alone and assaulted by the Red Guards](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=05b861ba6f&e=c169cb0a8e) following their unsuccessful attempt to disrupt our big canvass Sunday. I'm not the first person to face harassment from this anti-voting group, but I have been among the first in our community to name them and call them out. We will be taking extra precautions to keep not just me but all of our volunteers safe moving forward, so if you have any questions please reach out to our team.

But even with that bad news, the week has shown our campaign turning a corner - we met our fundraising goal and will now be able to buy giant yard signs, so thanks so much to everyone who chipped in! **If you want a free yard sign, please[fill out this form](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=27d7e72e0f&e=c169cb0a8e) and we will bring one to you.** If you missed the yard sign fundraiser but want a fun way to contribute, consider coming to our upcoming fundraiser at Patrizi's:
---
| [Fundraiser at Patrizi's!](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=17f013becd&e=c169cb0a8e "Fundraiser at Patrizi's!")
---
| And finally, we're wrapping up the week with one more bit of good news - yesterday, legendary [Austin City Councilmember Greg Casar endorsed our campaign](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=42270f1887&e=c169cb0a8e). Greg is one of my organizing heroes, and I've learned so much about being an organizer in office by working alongside him to win Paid Sick Days, to decriminalize homelessness, and to pass the progressive policing & immigration Freedom City policy he sponsored. I'm deeply honored to have the esteem and the support of my friend and fellow organizer.

I'm feeling strong about this campaign and the work we're doing. It means so much to have the support of our community, and I want yall to know we're working hard every day to spend every dollar we raised wisely, to reach our base and get folks voting and organizing. **When we win this election, it will be because of people like you who supported us** \- so thank you, because we couldn't do any of this without you.

In solidarity,

Heidi Sloan
---
| | [Donate](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=7a04298cbe&e=c169cb0a8e "Donate")
---

I'm not the first person to face harassment from this anti-voting group, but I have been among the first in our community to name them and call them out. We will be taking extra precautions to keep not just me but all of our volunteers safe moving forward, so if you have any questions please reach out to our team. But even with that bad news, the week has shown our campaign turning a corner - we met our fundraising goal and will now be able to buy giant yard signs, so thanks so much to everyone who chipped in! If you want a free yard sign, please and we will bring one to you. If you missed the yard sign fundraiser but want a fun way to contribute, consider coming to our upcoming fundraiser at Patrizi's: | "Fundraiser at Patrizi's!" | And finally, we're wrapping up the week with one more bit of good news - yesterday, legendary . Greg is one of my organizing heroes, and I've learned so much about being an organizer in office by working alongside him to win Paid Sick Days, to decriminalize homelessness, and to pass the progressive policing & immigration Freedom City policy he sponsored. I'm deeply honored to have the esteem and the support of my friend and fellow organizer. I'm feeling strong about this campaign and the work we're doing. It means so much to have the support of our community, and I want yall to know we're working hard every day to spend every dollar we raised wisely, to reach our base and get folks voting and organizing. When we win this election, it will be because of people like you who supported us \- so thank you, because we couldn't do any of this without you. In solidarity, Heidi Sloan | | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY HEIDI FOR CONGRESS

name: Jason Yates
subject: New Guidance for Prayer in Schools
body:
| | Dear Peter, At My Faith Votes we believe that when people of faith speak, our elected officials listen. Yesterday the voice of the faithful prompted the Department of Education to issue new guidance for prayer in schools. The President of the United States announced the guidelines in the Oval Office surrounded by Christian, Jewish, Muslim and other young people who had been discriminated against for their faith in their public schools. The full power of the President’s actions sent a message to every state and every school district in the country that America’s children can pray in their schools. Taking the action on National Religious Freedom Day, President Trump announced the updates to federal guidance on school prayer, which is required by federal law every two years but hasn’t been done since 2003. In addition to the new guidance on school prayer, nine federal agencies issued new proposed rules to ensure that the federal government does not discriminate against religious groups in the federal grant process. This is why we educate ourselves on the issues, pray for our nation and vote - because in America, every vote matters if we want to see faith advanced in America. We took some time to compile for you reactions from Christian leaders throughout the country regarding the President’s clear directive below. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200117com01&n=1) _“The White House isn’t saying whether one should pray or to whom or what they should pray to, they are simply making it clear that in the United States students have first amendment rights also, and our “separation of church and state” wasn’t intended to suppress a vibrant religious life in America but to facilitate it.”_ – Rev. Johnnie Moore
National Spokesperson, My Faith Votes _“It’s absurd that generations of our children, in our public schools, have been raised to think that there’s little to no place for faith outside of one’s church, one’s home or one’s heart. Our founding fathers would be utterly astonished that the one thing we thought wise was to deprive our children of their faith through America’s education system. Can’t we just agree that America is better off when people of faith pray, beginning with our children?”_ – Dr. David Jeremiah
Senior Pastor, Shadow Mountain Community Church _“This is a decision that should be celebrated by Democrats and by Republicans, by the religious and the irreligious, by all Americans from sea to shining sea who recognize the brilliance of the American idea wasn’t in a fear of religion but in the vibrancy of faith. Faith to believe that God exists or that he doesn’t, faith to pray before we legislate or anchor our pledge and our currency in subservience to a higher power. Faith to sing the song of freedom as the arc of history bends toward justice. Our children need not fear faith, especially in our sacred institutions of learning.”_ – Rev. Samuel Rodriguez
President, National Hispanic Christian Leadership Conference _“Pastors like myself all over America hear from our students of how intimidating some of our public schools have made it for young people of faith to pray. For too long we have lived under an interpretation of the separation of church and state that would have been utterly foreign to our founding fathers. These regulations give back to our students freedoms that shouldn’t have been taken away from them to begin with and it reminds Americans that faith is rightly at the heart of our nation and there’s no reason to fear it.”_ – Pastor Ray Bentley
Maranatha Chapel, San Diego _“I’ve lived long enough to remember well a time when public prayer was expected and appreciated, even in schools. I’ve also lived long enough to see the consequences of our societal disregard of the Ten Commandments and the eternal Truth they represent. For this reason, I’m greatly encouraged by the steps this administration is taking to correctly understand, restore, and preserve our constitutionally guaranteed freedoms.

We should celebrate the administration’s vital efforts to protect our religious freedom. But such work is in vain if we don’t seize the opportunity to live out our faith and thereby transform the heart of this nation.”_ – Dr. James Dobson
Founder and President of the Dr. James Dobson Family Institute _“Freedom-from-religion fanatics controlling our education system have bullied America’s educators to believe that public schools are religious-free zones and that teachers must stifle students’ religious freedoms or lose their jobs. Because of those lies, many students have been denied the right to pray, to host religious clubs on campus, or even to express their deeply held views in their assignments. That’s why the Trump administration was right to update Federal guidance on protected prayer and religious expression in public schools, undoing discriminatory Obama-era guidelines that led to gross First Amendment violations against students, teachers, and families.”_ – Rebecca Friedrichs
Founder, For Kids and Country _“For years I have sensed a growing restraint being placed upon students, faculty and administration about practicing prayer in public schools. I am convinced the greatest need in our schools is to release students, faculty and administration to live out their faith publicly, including the practice of prayer. Therefore, I am thankful for any clarity about First Amendment rights that releases all persons to practice their faith in our schools and in every public setting.”_ – Dr. Ronnie Floyd
CEO, Southern Baptist Convention _“We affirm the administration's proposed rules designed to ensure that the government doesn't treat religious individuals and organizations as second-class to secular institutions, [and] the president's directive requiring all public schools to respect their students' religious liberty, is also a welcome step to remedy these attacks on people of faith.”_ – Dr. Michael Farris
President and CEO, Alliance Defending Freedom _“These revisions to the Guidelines on Prayer and Religious Expression ensure that the religious liberty of students in public schools is protected. The religious freedom of America’s public school students and teachers does not stop at the schoolhouse gate. Today’s guidelines affirm that promise.”_ – Kelly Shackleford
President and Chief Counsel, First Liberty Institute _“The presidential bully pulpit is never better utilized than when it upholds our country’s first freedoms spelled out in the Constitution's Bill of Rights. Critics of religious freedom often accuse people like me of wanting to establish a theocracy in the public schools, transforming classrooms into churches and auditoriums into worship centers. But this simply isn’t true. We’re not looking to coerce or force anyone to accept our beliefs – we simply want government to respect our constitutionally derived right to freely express our own deeply held faith. In America, you don’t lose your religious freedom when you step from the street into the classroom.”_ – Dr. Jim Daly
President, Focus on the Family _“We are grateful that the right of religious liberty is cherished in this country. I appreciate concrete actions the Administration has undertaken, such as recent steps to protect faith-based social service providers. May we Catholics in America resolve to build on our inheritance for the good of all.”_ – Bishop George V. Murry
S.J. of Youngstown, and chairman of the U.S. Conference of Catholic Bishops’ Committee for Religious Liberty [Support My Faith Votes with your tax deductible donation.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66idsHszZ_cNjdrkrk6Ct22R5LqpO-pYuvVIOOj4RsxM_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200117com01&n=2) _My Faith Votes is a nonpartisan movement that motivates, equips and activates Christians in America to vote in every election, transforming our communities and influencing our nation with biblical truth. By partnering with national faith leaders, My Faith Votes provides resources to help Christians Pray, Think, and Act to create an America where God is honored in the public square._
---
* * *

Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200117com01&n=3)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200117com01&n=4) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200117com01&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200117com01&n=6)

subject: National Republicans don't scare me

| | I'm the daughter of immigrants -- my parents taught me the value of hard work. They're the reason I worked my way through the Air Force Academy, became the first in my family to graduate college, deployed five times, and flew over 200 combat missions -- and the reason I'm running for Congress now. I watched my parents work hard to build a better life for our family. But I see so many other families just like mine working hard to get ahead, and still struggling to make ends meet. This is a symptom of a broken system that caters to special interests before everyday people -- and I'm fighting tooth and nail to change it. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - I'm the daughter of immigrants -- my parents taught me the value of hard work. **My Republican opponent Steve Chabot takes millions in corporate PAC and special interest money** \-- and in return, he's voted to make it easier for insurance companies to discriminate against people with pre-existing conditions and voted against pay raises for working Americans.
National Republicans know I have a real shot to take out Chabot in November -- so they've set their sights on smearing me as a **" socialist loser"** and **" far-left."**
**I 'm not scared of them and their transparent attacks** \-- I haven't backed down from a challenge yet, and I'm definitely not going to start now.

name: Booker Senate HQ
subject: We're not taking any chances here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | We have to be ready for whatever comes our way. Team, Now that Cory is running for re-election to the Senate, we have to build a first-rate campaign as quickly as possible -- and we're going to need major resources to do it. Here's the truth: Cory fought as hard as he could to win the presidential race, for as long as he could. **But that means we 're starting this re-election campaign behind where we'd like to be.** Many senators running for re-election this November already launched their campaigns months ago -- raising money, hiring staff, investing in ads, and much more. It's clear that we have some catching up to do. **[After working so hard on the presidential race, Cory is asking his most committed supporters to help us ramp up this re-election effort right now. Donate today to become one of our 2020 Founding Donors.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200117_BSHQ_20200117-fr-BSHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As the impeachment proceedings in the Senate begin, it's safe to say that the need for Cory's leadership in Washington is greater now than ever before. He is a powerful voice in the Senate who will always hold Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell accountable. But now, there are already a handful of pro-Trump, Republican candidates running against Cory. Not to mention that multi-million dollar special interest groups might try to get involved in this race at any minute and spread misinformation about Cory's record. **We 're not taking any chances here. We have to be ready for whatever comes our way.** **[It's a major reason why we set a big $250,000 goal to get us started. Will you be one of the founding donors who helps us get there?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200117_BSHQ_20200117-fr-BSHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you for helping us reach our first big goal of this campaign. We can't do this without you. Booker Senate HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200117_BSHQ_20200117-fr-BSHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc6/5fca0d19/7a8c1e2c/291d3c58/2174917712/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc6/5fca0d19/7a8c1e2c/291d3ca7/2174917712/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc6/5fca0d19/7a8c1e2c/291d3ca6/2174917712/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc6/5fca0d19/7a8c1e2c/291d3ca5/2174917712/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").

name: Franken Finance Team
subject: Ideas not checkbooks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Mike is running a grassroots campaign. He wants Iowans, not some Washington lobbyist or party hack, determining the next senator for our state.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello, friends -- Next week will mark the 10th anniversary of _Citizens ' United vs. FEC_ oral arguments. This landmark ruling by the Supreme Court damaged our electoral system by creating the "super PAC," effectively handing power to the billionaire class and special interests. With their endless cash, they can buy seats in Congress for puppets who support their corrupt agenda -- one that takes from Iowans and gives to the wealthy. **Mike is running a grassroots campaign. He wants Iowans, not some Washington lobbyist or party hack, determining the next senator for our state.[Can you join his campaign with a quick $5 donation?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24d2/33365068/4a6f03ed/3f8b9c81/3843375230/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200117_citizensunited_em_fr_L1&amount=5")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24d2/33365068/4a6f03ed/3f8b9c82/3843375230/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200117_citizensunited_em_fr_btn1&amount=5")
---
**Let 's be clear, we're going up against an opponent who with one quick phone call, whisper in an ear, or sly wink, can raise tens of thousands of dollars. **
Mike is relying on you, if we're going to win. Only a grassroots movement -- thousands of Americans fed up with the current political system -- can put us ahead in November. [**So, chip in today, chip in tomorrow, chip in whenever you can, because the GOP can take shortcuts -- we can 't.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24d2/33365068/4a6f03ed/3f8b9c83/3843375230/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200117_citizensunited_em_fr_L2&amount=15")

---
Thank you,
Franken Finance Team

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24d2/33365068/4a6f03ed/3f8b9c9d/3843375230/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200117_citizensunited_em_fr_ftr&amount=15")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want you to Miss
body:
Vice President Pence: A Partisan Impeachment, a Profile in Courage | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb12e77de0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Vice President Pence: A Partisan Impeachment, a Profile in Courage**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea44200ec3&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“As the U.S. Senate takes up a purely partisan impeachment, and the mainstream media focuses on what Republican senators may do, it may be timely to consult Kennedy’s definition of political courage and why he considered one statesman in particular worthy of admiration,” Vice President Mike Pence writes. In 1868, it was Republicans who tried to impeach a President they didn’t like on “dubious constitutional grounds.” In what one historian called “the most heroic act in American history,” Sen. Edmund Ross of Kansas ignored political pressure and voted to acquit President Andrew Johnson.

“Who, among the Senate Democrats, will stand up to the passions of their party this time?”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Honors National Champion LSU Tigers at White House**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=945c9c7da0&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Just days after they capped off a 15-0 national championship season in the Mercedes-Benz Superdome with President Trump in attendance, the LSU Tigers stopped by the White House on Friday to be honored by the commander in chief. They topped Clemson 42-25 to grab their first title since the 2007-2008 season,” Tyler Olson reports.

**Watch:** [President and First Lady attend the National Championship game](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e730ae030&e=3ee4985eea)

| [**Trump's Phase One China Trade Deal Result of Negotiator-in-Chief's Courage**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=675f3e8d2a&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“For decades, as a result of political short-sightedness and economic expediency, policymakers have acquiesced to Communist-controlled China,” Rep. Jodey Arrington (R-TX) writes. “At this critical juncture in history, we are fortunate to have a Negotiator-in-Chief who understands that China is the biggest existential threat to America and, more importantly, who has the political courage to do something about it.”

**🎬** **History made:** [President Trump signs historic deal with China](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4352a60346&e=3ee4985eea)

-_New York Post_
“The Senate in a landslide vote Thursday passed a new trade deal with Mexico and Canada, giving President Trump his second high-profile trade win in as many days,” Mark Moore reports. USMCA will replace the Clinton-era, job-killing NAFTA and “passed by a 89-10 vote, sending it to the president’s desk for his signature.”

**VP Pence:** [‘USMCA Is a Huge Win for American Workers and American Farmers’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f95244726&e=3ee4985eea)

-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The Senate can now do better by the Constitution by holding a trial that judges President Trump without validating the partisan House process and its weak case . . . The House hearings blocked GOP witnesses and limited cross-examination. Despite selective leaks and a pro-impeachment media, they failed to move public opinion,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

**MORE:** [“A normal court would reject a dishonest prosecutor like Adam Schiff”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=321e71ecb3&e=3ee4985eea)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Breaking records (again)
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/breaking-records-again?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Breaking Records (Again)

Governor Eric Holcomb knows a thing or two about breaking records. And this week, he broke another – closing out 2019 with more campaign cash in the bank ($7.25 million) than any other governor going into their reelection year in Indiana history!

When you add that number to the end-of-year totals for your Indiana Republican Party ($1.04 million) and Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch ($316,570), we broke another record for this point in the election cycle with $8.61 million combined cash on hand.

What does this mean? It means Hoosiers are liking what they see from our Holcomb-Crouch team. They like the results they’re delivering Hoosiers – balanced budgets, a fully-funded infrastructure plan (with our infrastructure ranked #1 in the nation!), 4% wage growth, record numbers of high-wage Hoosier job commitments, military pensions exempt from state income tax, drug overdose deaths down nearly 13%, and so much more.

And it also means we’re well-positioned to drive turnout and elect Republicans up and down the ballot this year. It’s going to be a record breaking year, and we’re thankful that you’re here to be a part of it.

-Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=01Szab1m9OM&fbclid=IwAR11BLxKGHzjo5JpkHBXN34yAPimfXA4QBdnGQaazdAfzbPBNMky5rrTDds&mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

A State of the State to Remember!

This week, Governor Holcomb took to the airwaves across Indiana to deliver his fourth State of the State address. He described extensive progress on some of Indiana’s greatest challenges, while also detailing bold ideas on what’s next for Indiana.

Just as you might imagine, this speech was all focused around Putting People First – including our kids, teachers, veterans, patients, workers and offenders returning to society. Big news from the speech focused on:
* Fiat-Chrysler’s production of a new engine in Kokomo (https://www.wthr.com/article/fiat-chrysler-invest-400m-new-kokomo-engine-plant?mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
* The creation of a new Adoption Unit at the Department of Child Services
* More than 10,000 Hoosiers completing a credential (https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/41574642/indiana-marks-milestone-for-job-training-program?mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for a high-wage, high-demand job through Next Level Jobs
* Governor Holcomb’s recommendation that the General Assembly directs an additional $250 million from the surplus and put it toward teacher retirement funds in the next budget, generating $50 million/year to teacher pay!

In case you missed it, you can still check out the full speech here (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=01Szab1m9OM&fbclid=IwAR11BLxKGHzjo5JpkHBXN34yAPimfXA4QBdnGQaazdAfzbPBNMky5rrTDds&mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) (and share it with your friends, family and neighbors)!

2019 Fundraising: By the Numebrs

Check out this infographic highlighting the record fundraising finish in 2019 for Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch and your Indiana Republican Party!

Congratulations, Mindy Westrick Brown!

Mindy Westrick Brown has been selected as state secretary of the Indiana Republican Party! For her, this is like going back where it all started, as she’s previously held roles as the executive director of the party and the executive assistant to the chairman. Today, she serves as the vice president of the Indiana Energy Association.

We're glad you’re taking on this important role and helping the Indiana Republican Party continue to serve all Hoosiers!
http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Congress of Counties: Agenda Announced!

Congress of Counties is now just two weeks away (January 31-February 1)! Have you booked your ticket yet? (http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) Whether you’re a Republican Party leader or looking to become more involved – candidates, grassroots activists, volunteers and more – this event kicking off the 2020 election cycle is an event you won’t want to miss.

And if you can’t make the whole event, we’ve got your covered with registration options available (http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for just the Friday night reception, Saturday lunch...or both!

Congress of Counties will include breakout sessions with topics including:
* Making the Decision: Recruiting Candidates & Launching a Campaign
* Diversity: The Art of Thinking Independently Together
* Building Blocks of a Successful Campaign
* County Officer Training: The Roles & Responsibilities
* Campaign Finance
* Data Center: The Basics & How to Create Walkbooks & 50%+
* Understanding Social Media: Facebook, Twitter, Instagram & More
* And more!

Check out the full Congress of Counties line-up here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c1fd95598e&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and make sure to register to secure your spot now! (http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

File Now: Run to Be a Delegate at the
2020 Indiana Republican Party Convention

Filing is now open to put your name on the May 2020 Republican primary ballot. This includes running for positions within your Republican Party, including running to be a precinct committeeman or a delegate to represent your county at the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention!

If you're interested in running to be a delegate at this year's state convention, which runs June 19-20 in Indianapolis, check out our new state convention website! (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bc50c25b37&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

100 Years: Anniversary of the 19^th Amendment Ratification!

This week’s State of the State address and financial filings aren’t the only things that will make this week go down in Hoosier history.

Yesterday was the 100^th anniversary of Indiana’s ratification of the 19^th amendment to the U.S. Constitution, which gives women the right to vote. There was a big celebration at the Statehouse, with the festivities continuing throughout the year across Indiana.

Your Indiana Republican Party is proud of our female elected officials throughout Indiana – including most of your statewide elected officials!

Check out this op-ed by Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch (https://www.indystar.com/story/opinion/2020/01/15/lt-gov-crouch-celebrate-womens-suffrage-anniversary-going-polls/4477743002/?mc_cid=4cccdba2ef&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) marking this occasion, and make sure you participate in the best celebration of all this year – voting!

name: StephanieSchmid.com
subject: Stephanie was great in her debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
In both debates, she separated herself as the candidate with the best, most expansive vision for Central Jersey
|
---

| | Stephanie participated in two debates this week, team -- **and she was on fire.** In both debates, she separated herself as the candidate with the best, most expansive vision for Central Jersey -- increased access to affordable health care, a return to people-first politics, and a voice for women across our district and our country. **The momentum is on our side, but we can 't take our foot off the gas. [Can you keep us rolling forward with a quick donation?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e2/522d4087/7aff08b9/4f341089/40484606/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=20200117_debate_em_fr_l1") ** | **[KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM>>](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e2/522d4087/7aff08b9/4f341088/40484606/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=20200117_debate_em_fr_btn1")**
---
Our ability to keep up this momentum is dependent on our grassroots team because Stephanie isn't taking corporate PAC money. She believes campaigns should be powered by people who vote, not nameless, faceless corporations -- with agendas that only benefit their bottom line, at the expense of New Jersey families.
**Our path to victory starts with voters understanding why Stephanie is the right person to represent this district.** But our operation to ensure every voter knows about her progressive, bold vision for Central New Jersey relies on people like you, friends.
[**Click here, make a donation, and become a part of our team to flip this seat from red to blue >> **](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e2/522d4087/7aff08b9/4f341087/40484606/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=20200117_debate_em_fr_l2")

---

Team Stephanie

_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Your contributions power this campaign, and I'm so grateful to know every day that you're with me.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200117-ty?refcode=em200117-ty&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend --

Thanks to your support, we reached our very first fundraising goal of the year. I'm so proud of this incredible grassroots team for stepping up in every which way.

Let me be completely candid with you for a moment: It says a lot about the campaign we're building that we were able to rise up to the challenge and hit our first target of this critical election year.

Your contributions power this campaign, and I'm so grateful to know every day that you're with me.

Now that we're officially in the throes of an election, you and I both know we have many big fights ahead of us. Our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and flip the majority will be one of the most consequential tasks of our lifetimes. But I believe we're up to it.

I'll be in touch on how you can support our campaign in the coming weeks but for now, thank you for everything you have already done.

Talk soon.

-- Tina | [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200117-ty?refcode=em200117-ty&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&")
